name: garimpo-extension
description: Extensao Chrome MV3 read-only sobre o WhatsApp Web (Garimpo).

scripts.build: esbuild src/content/main.mjs --bundle --format=iife --outfile=content.bundle.js --target=chrome110 && esbuild src/content/maps.mjs --bundle --format=iife --outfile=maps.bundle.js --target=chrome110 && esbuild src/content/crm-bridge.mjs --bundle --format=iife --outfile=crm-bridge.bundle.js --target=chrome110 && esbuild src/background.mjs --bundle --format=iife --outfile=background.bundle.js --target=chrome110 && esbuild src/content/wa-relay.mjs --bundle --format=iife --outfile=wa-relay.bundle.js --target=chrome111 && esbuild src/content/wa-glue.mjs --bundle --format=iife --outfile=wa-glue.bundle.js --target=chrome111 && cp node_modules/@wppconnect/wa-js/dist/wppconnect-wa.js wa-js.bundle.js
